channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-2529] Interop 2.1.3<->2.4 Failure on test suite recovery-small test_23: post-failover df: 1
item.description:
This issue was created by maloo for sarah <sarah@whamcloud.com>

This issue relates to the following test suite run: https://maloo.whamcloud.com/test_sets/ce125f96-4a87-11e2-8a7b-52540035b04c.

The sub-test test_23 failed with the following error:

post-failover df: 1

Info required for matching: recovery-small 23
item.summary: Interop 2.1.3<->2.4 Failure on test suite recovery-small test_23: post-failover df: 1

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.

comments.comment: Close old bug that has not been hit in a long time.

Another failure seen in interop between 2.1.4 server and 2.4 client(build #1269)
https://maloo.whamcloud.com/test_sets/56848a12-7d81-11e2-85d0-52540035b04c

Found this in MDS dmesg

Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: /usr/sbin/lctl mark == recovery-small test 23: client hang when close a file after mds crash == 04:11:56 \(1361535116\)
Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: == recovery-small test 23: client hang when close a file after mds crash == 04:11:56 (1361535116)
Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: lctl set_param fail_loc=0x123
Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: lctl set_param fail_loc=0
Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: grep -c /mnt/mds1' ' /proc/mounts
Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: umount -d /mnt/mds1
Lustre: Failing over lustre-MDT0000
Lustre: Skipped 29 previous similar messages
Lustre: 6108:0:(quota_master.c:795:close_quota_files()) quota[0] is off already
Lustre: 6108:0:(quota_master.c:795:close_quota_files()) Skipped 7 previous similar messages
Lustre: mdd_obd-lustre-MDT0000: shutting down for failover; client state will be preserved.
Lustre: Skipped 9 previous similar messages
Lustre: MGS has stopped.
Lustre: Skipped 3 previous similar messages
LustreError: 6108:0:(ldlm_request.c:1174:ldlm_cli_cancel_req()) Got rc -108 from cancel RPC: canceling anyway
LustreError: 6108:0:(ldlm_request.c:1174:ldlm_cli_cancel_req()) Skipped 3 previous similar messages
LustreError: 6108:0:(ldlm_request.c:1801:ldlm_cli_cancel_list()) ldlm_cli_cancel_list: -108
LustreError: 6108:0:(ldlm_request.c:1801:ldlm_cli_cancel_list()) Skipped 3 previous similar messages
Lustre: 6108:0:(client.c:1817:ptlrpc_expire_one_request()) @@@ Request  sent has timed out for slow reply: [sent 1361535122/real 1361535122]  req@ffff8800684a9800 x1427665918748780/t0(0) o251->MGC10.10.4.164@tcp@0@lo:26/25 lens 192/192 e 0 to 1 dl 1361535128 ref 2 fl Rpc:XN/0/ffffffff rc 0/-1
Lustre: 6108:0:(client.c:1817:ptlrpc_expire_one_request()) Skipped 10 previous similar messages
Lustre: server umount lustre-MDT0000 complete
Lustre: Skipped 3 previous similar messages
Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: lsmod | grep lnet > /dev/null && lctl dl | grep ' ST '
Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: hostname
Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: test -b /dev/lvm-MDS/P1
Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: mkdir -p /mnt/mds1; mount -t lustre -o user_xattr,acl  		                   /dev/lvm-MDS/P1 /mnt/mds1
LDISKFS-fs warning (device dm-0): ldiskfs_fill_super: extents feature not enabled on this filesystem, use tune2fs.
LDISKFS-fs (dm-0): mounted filesystem with ordered data mode. Opts: 
LDISKFS-fs warning (device dm-0): ldiskfs_fill_super: extents feature not enabled on this filesystem, use tune2fs.
LDISKFS-fs (dm-0): mounted filesystem with ordered data mode. Opts: 
Lustre: MGS MGS started
